item.title: John Farnham celebrates 77th birthday with family as he continues mouth cancer recovery
item.description: John Farnham celebrated his 77th birthday on Wednesday, surrounded by his loving family and one very smiley grandson.

item.title: Boxing Australia in chaos as CEO Dinah Glykidis quits after the departure of national integrity manager
item.description: Weeks out from the Commonwealth Games the governing body is dealing with bombshell claims and multiple vacancies.

item.title: Ukrainian tycoon Vadym Yermolaiev targeted in Monaco explosion
item.description: The suspect ‘had walked around the area several times while waiting for the victims’, police say.

item.title: Family of WA man Jesse Bruzzese desperate for answers after 35-year-old goes missing in Mexico
item.description: Loved ones have issued an appeal for information, desperate to confirm he is safe.

item.title: Bailey Smith credits cognitive behavioural therapy for newfound temperament in 2026
item.description: The deep-thinking AFL midfielder has learned to ‘tame the beast’ inside of him through a new method.

item.title: Village People frontman Victor Willis dies after short illness
item.description: The iconic 1970s disco group confirmed the death of their frontman on Wednesday.

item.title: Midwinter Ball 2026: All frock and bubble at federal parliament’s night of nights
item.description: Politicians, lobbyists, journalists and staffers have donned their finest for the ‘Canberra bubble’-themed ball.

item.title: The tech bringing experts to the beds of regional patients where every minute can mean life or death
item.description: ‘We know that regional Australians are 17 per cent more likely and have higher risk factors. So getting that specialist care is critical.’

item.title: Lethal Weapon star Danny Glover reveals Alzheimer's diagnosis
item.description: ‘I don’t feel like it’s the end of my life. There’s work to do. I still have my daughter, I have friends. I want to just say, your life continues.’

item.title: Daredevil couple climbs Empire State Building in wild proposal
item.description: Shocking video captures the moment the duo unfurled a huge peace banner while perched atop the iconic New York skyscraper.

item.title: Federal government pledges $2 million to Venezuela, as death toll from twin earthquakes spikes
item.description: Rescue crews have pulled thousands of people from the rubble, as more remain missing.

item.title: Expert reveals how long it will take for falling prices to end housing costs crisis
item.description: An affordability gap has built up over years of property prices outpacing wages growth.

item.title: Disturbing new detail emerges in alleged murder of Thai teenager by Australian man
item.description: Simon Carman is accused of killing a 17-year-old girl he met in Thailand’s Pattaya red light district.

item.title: Swim Shady: Legendary US rap artist Eminem loses trademark battle with Aussie beachwear brand
item.description: The Aussie swimwear brand was locked in a ‘David vs Goliath’ trademark battle with the rap star.

item.title: Sony ends physical game disks for PlayStation as digital sales soar
item.description: Experts say gamers will have serious concerns ‘around various aspects of this announcement’.

item.title: Man pulled from rubble in ‘miraculous’ rescue eight days after devastating Venezuela earthquakes
item.description: He spent eight days buried under the wreckage of a collapsed shopping mall parking lot.

item.title: 'Night of horror': Russia bombards Kyiv in series of deadly attacks
item.description: Moscow has launched a massive missile and drone attack on Kyiv in what it says is revenge for strikes on Russian infrastructure.

item.title: Under-fire leader unveils sweeping reforms for Germany
item.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz and his coalition partners have introduced a reform package to revive the country's sluggish economy.

item.title: Oz Lotto draw 1689: First-time tactic wins Central Coast man $30 million Oz Lotto jackpot
item.description: ‘I’m quite proud of myself.’

item.title: UK zoo owners speak out after toddler allegedly thrown into crocodile enclosure
item.description: New details have emerged about the ‘distressing’ incident.

item.title: First suspected cases of H5N1 bird flu in NSW and Perth
item.description: ‘This latest development is incredibly concerning for both agriculture and for wildlife.’

item.title: Influencer and model Nara Smith receives outpouring of support after revealing daughter’s cancer diagnosis
item.description: ‘Some days are a little easier, some days are really hard.’

item.title: Health Minister Mark Butler slams Coalition for blocking social media ban reforms
item.description: Deputy Opposition Leader Jane Hume has defended not rushing through changes targeting tech giants.

item.title: Albanese teases public holiday if Australia wins FIFA World Cup
item.description: Socceroos fever has gripped the nation.

item.title: Australia’s ‘cheapest’ capital city CBD home sells at auction in Adelaide
item.description: The quaint one-bedroom property might need more than a lick of paint.

item.title: Uber introduces cash payments but one state excluded from rollout
item.description: It says the back-to-the-future decision gives customers options.

item.title: The five-minute call that can make a grandparent’s whole day and the tech they need to make it happen
item.description: ‘Sometimes the device is the difference between spending time with a loved one or not.’

item.title: Ukrainian woman disguised as a man is main suspect in Monaco attack
item.description: A Ukrainian tycoon was the target of the attack and was wounded in the explosion.

item.title: Millions of Australians are treating back pain wrong, new research reveals
item.description: Back pain is one of the leading causes of disability worldwide.

item.title: Mission to save NASA telescope that's falling to Earth
item.description: ‘This is a high-risk, high-reward mission.’

item.title: Global Lebanese community ‘traumatised’ by horror conflict between Israel and Hezbollah
item.description: ‘Everyone knows someone who has been affected.’

item.title: The simple tech mistakes keeping families apart and how to fix it
item.description: ‘The more people you talk to, especially within your own family unit about what’s going on, the more help you can get.’

item.title: Jury duty explained: What really happens behind closed doors as 12 ordinary Australians decide someone’s fate
item.description: Jurors face confronting evidence, strict social media rules and the weight of deciding another person’s future.

item.title: Chemical risk prompts major response after mystery space objects wash up at Forrest Beach in Queensland
item.description: Authorities are keeping locals away from the beach until the mysterious cannisters can be removed.

item.title: Extreme heat disrupts Fourth of July celebrations across US
item.description: US authorities were forced to cancel numerous 250th anniversary celebrations around the country as a ‘heat-dome’ endangers people’s health.

item.title: Aussies warned not to panic as state confirms first case of bird flu
item.description: NSW says there is no evidence of spread to wildlife from the now confirmed case.

item.title: Venezuela earthquake: Owner finds beloved dog after it was trapped in rubble for days
item.description: ‘With all the tragedy of the earthquake, it’s one positive thing in all the bad.’

item.title: Is your child devastated the Socceroos lost? Here’s how to help
item.description: Australia’s heart-wrenching loss in the World Cup could be an opportunity to help children strengthen their emotional regulation skills.

item.description: ‘Let’s just stop it here and call Roger to come.’

item.title: Week-long funeral ceremony begins in Iran for slain leader Ali Khamenei
item.description: Crowds and clerics weeped as the zealot’s body lay in state.

item.title: Neil the seal wreaks havoc as experts warn of ‘loving him to death’
item.description: The state’s favourite elephant seal could be in danger of being euthanised.

item.title: Ex chess champion Vladimir Kramnik suspended over his cheating claims
item.description: ‘I am absolutely confident that this unlawful verdict will ultimately be overturned.’

item.title: Canada's Tim Tam bargain riles up Nationals leader Matt Canavan
item.description: ‘I mean, in the words of the Simpsons, did we lose a war?’

item.title: Frank Green founder celebrates selling 28 million reusable bottles to Australians
item.description: The man behind the empire has revealed why demand for designer hydration has never been hotter.

item.description: ‘I can live with him missing that because he wasn’t scared at the moment.’

item.description: The 44-year-old says she is ‘heartbroken’ by the painful fallout from the first-round loss to her Aussie rival.

item.title: Anti-American chants and calls for revenge dominate Ali Khamenei’s funeral as Hezbollah and Hamas attend ceremonies
item.description: Millions are expected to attend ceremonies across Iran and Iraq over the coming week.

item.title: Sarcoma diagnosis: The deadly cancer that survivors say is easy to miss
item.description: Sam Mathias was 22, finishing university and getting ready to start his career when he felt ‘little niggles’ in his lungs and shoulder. It turned out to be one of Australia's deadliest yet least recognised cancers.

item.title: Severe thunderstorms spark evacuation during America’s 250th anniversary celebrations at the National Mall in Washington DC
item.description: Organisers issued evacuation orders in Washington DC as storms gathered with the US president declaring the wild weather would ‘bring luck’.

item.title: Mother charged after 14-month-old son hospitalised with blood alcohol level over four times legal limit
item.description: A 27-year-old woman has been charged after her 14-month-old son was found with a blood alcohol level more than four times the legal limit

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding venue sparked controversy — but it may have been their only option
item.description: From handwritten vows and celebrity guests to the reason New York’s Madison Square Garden was perhaps the only venue that made sense, here’s everything we know about America’s ‘Royal Wedding’.

item.title: She won gold for her country. Now a cut to her NDIS plan has stripped her of independence
item.description: Mum-of-two Tracey Barrell OAM has been stripped of support to be able to shower or eat lunch under her new government plan.

item.title: Investigation launched into carers of man accused of throwing toddler into croc enclosure at Cambridgeshire’s Johnsons of Old Hurst zoo
item.description: A disabled man is accused of throwing the three-year-old boy into the crocodile enclosure.

item.description: A 50-metre exclusion zone remains active around the area.

item.description: It is the second major festival to pull the plug in recent days.

item.description: The Brazil legend was in tears after his international career came full circle with his last touch.

item.description: The TV and film actress has very quietly expanded her young family as she lives abroad.

item.description: Handmade pasta, rich fillings and classic Italian flavours come together in this comforting winter dish.

item.description: ‘This level of ambition is possible because Australia and Fiji are Vuvale – family.’

item.description: Toyota has reopened orders for some LandCruiser 70 Series variants, but others are still off sale after emissions upgrades.

item.title: Toyota’s first electric ute isn't attracting many private buyers
item.description: Fleet buyers are driving early Toyota HiLux BEV demand, with private sales still in single figures.

item.description: Toyota’s Australian sales are down nearly one quarter, but the brand says supply – not demand – is the problem.

item.description: An Australian ref was at the centre of ‘an absolute circus’ as mayhem unfolded both on the pitch and off it.

item.title: Arizona toddler Vincent Fiordilino declared dead then found alive in morgue five hours later
item.description: A US couple’s world collapsed after their toddler Vincent died. One phone call five hours later would turn the couple’s grief into disbelief.

item.description: Submissions on a proposal to remove an exemption from emissions laws for vehicles with a gross vehicle mass of more than 3.5 tonnes close this month.
